Title: Monetary and Multidimensional Poverty in Cameroon: Measurements, Determinants, and Policy Implications
objetivo: Cameroon has witnessed substantial economic growth in the new millennium, while poverty reduction has been limited and inequality has worsened. hallazgos: Our results indicate that both monetary and multidimensional poverty have decreased in Cameroon between 2001 and 2018, albeit slowly and to varying degrees across the different demographic, socioeconomic and spatial groups of the population.
